docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $12,500.00 FILED BY LYUBARSKY, DAVID AS TO DEFENDANT SWICKARD SF CORPORATION ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-05-2025 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVICE FEE: $50.00 SERVED FEB-07-2025, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT SWICKARD SF CORPORATION
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) MATTHEW VAND, SENIOR SALES EXECUTIVE FILED BY DEFENDANT SWICKARD SF CORPORATION

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-05-2025 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAR-05-2025 BY VISITING JUDGE CHRISTOPHER CHANDLER. APPEARANCES: PLAINTIFF DAVID LYUBARSKY IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT SWICKARD SF CORPORATION IS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. NOT REPORTED (D506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-05-2025 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LYUBARSKY, DAVID RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SWICKARD SF CORPORATION $12,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $75.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $12,575.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
